channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: U.S. soldier charged with using classified information to bet on Maduro's removal
item.description: It's the first time suspected insider trading on Polymarket has led to criminal charges in the U.S.
item.content:encoded:
It's the first time suspected insider trading on Polymarket has led to criminal charges in the U.S.

(Image credit: Jesus Vargas)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: French police probe suspected weather device tampering after odd Polymarket bet
item.description: The incident is the latest eyebrow-raising bet on Polymarket, as allegations of rigging and manipulation continue to haunt the popular prediction market site.
item.content:encoded:
The incident is the latest eyebrow-raising bet on Polymarket, as allegations of rigging and manipulation continue to haunt the popular prediction market site.

(Image credit: Riccardo Milani)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: The FDA gives the green light to the first gene therapy for deafness
item.description: The treatment, developed by Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, is for a very rare form of deafness. But it represents a medical milestone.
item.content:encoded: The treatment, developed by Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, is for a very rare form of deafness. But it represents a medical milestone.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: Meta will lay off 10% of its staff
item.description: The cuts follow losses in two pivotal court cases and the company's push to invest in artificial intelligence.
item.content:encoded:
The cuts follow losses in two pivotal court cases and the company's push to invest in artificial intelligence.

(Image credit: Noah Berger)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Airlines in Europe slash thousands of flights as Iran war cuts jet fuel supplies
item.description: The soaring cost of jet fuel is forcing European airlines to cancel tens of thousands of flights, while energy authorities warned of a possible jet fuel shortage if supplies aren't replenished soon.
item.content:encoded:
The soaring cost of jet fuel is forcing European airlines to cancel tens of thousands of flights, while energy authorities warned of a possible jet fuel shortage if supplies aren't replenished soon.

(Image credit: Isabelle Souriment + Hans Lucas)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Author details the spy network that took on America's post-WWII Nazi groups
item.description: In The Secret War Against Hate, Steven J. Ross details the racist, anti-Semitic groups that sprang up in the latter half of the 20th century — and the spy network that worked to bring them to justice.
item.content:encoded: In The Secret War Against Hate, Steven J. Ross details the racist, anti-Semitic groups that sprang up in the latter half of the 20th century — and the spy network that worked to bring them to justice.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: Can a mentalist trick Trump? Oz Pearlman will try in a room full of journalists
item.description: The White House Correspondents' Dinner will be headlined by a mentalist instead of a comedian. Oz Pearlman tells NPR he hopes to unify, delight and puzzle the crowd — but can't reveal how.
item.content:encoded:
The White House Correspondents' Dinner will be headlined by a mentalist instead of a comedian. Oz Pearlman tells NPR he hopes to unify, delight and puzzle the crowd — but can't reveal how.

(Image credit: Arturo Holmes)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: How mosquitoes — and malaria — helped shape the whereabouts of early humankind
item.description: A new study looks at an unexpected force that played a critical role in shaping the lives of ancient humans.
item.content:encoded:
A new study looks at an unexpected force that played a critical role in shaping the lives of ancient humans.

(Image credit: Smith Collection)
item.dc:creator: Ari Daniel

item.title: Trump administration eases rules on some marijuana categories. Here's what to know
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said he is immediately moving medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, which includes drugs like ketamine, Tylenol with codeine and anabolic steroids.
item.content:encoded:
Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche said he is immediately moving medical marijuana from Schedule I to Schedule III, which includes drugs like ketamine, Tylenol with codeine and anabolic steroids.

(Image credit: Justin Sullivan)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell

item.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
item.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the Secretary of the Navy is out of the role.
item.content:encoded:
Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the Secretary of the Navy is out of the role.

(Image credit: Andrew Cabellero-Reynolds)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton
